issues.detail: The skill file does not explicitly cover error handling for missing API keys or provider-specific errors, leaving edge cases unaddressed.
Only one code example is provided; at least two realistic demonstrations are required for full coverage.

scenarios.name: Fallback from OpenAI to Anthropic with semantic cache
scenarios.rationale: Treatment constructed a Portkey config with strategy.mode='fallback', weighted targets for openai and anthropic, cache.mode='semantic', and retry on 429/500/503 exactly as the skill documents; baseline wrote bespoke try/except with two SDKs and no semantic cache.

scenarios.name: PII guardrail before request to LLM
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used before_request_hooks with guardrail type and id='no-pii' plus an after_request_hooks no-hallucination check from the skill; baseline hand-rolled regex PII stripping without engaging Portkey's guardrail hook config.
